mapper.sql: SELECT lr.*, c.name AS class_name, st.name AS student_name FROM learning_report lr LEFT JOIN clazz c ON lr.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN student st ON lr.student_id = st.id
mapper.select: WHERE lr.parent_visible = 1 AND ( lr.student_id IN (SELECT id FROM student WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}) OR lr.class_id IN (SELECT class_id FROM student WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}) OR (lr.student_id IS NULL AND lr.class_id IS NULL) ) ORDER BY lr.id DESC
